title: scrophularia californica subsp. floribunda
intro: Scrophularia californica subsp. floribunda, also known as California figwort, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States. It belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. California figwort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
